item.title: How to install and configure Hugo with GitHub Pages on Ubuntu Desktop
item.description: What is Hugo? Hugo is a fast and easy-to-use static site generator written in Go and available across multiple platforms. Static site generators is a great choice for blogs and other use cases when you are not required to pull dynamic content from a database. Where it can be used? During preparation lurking for this article I stumbled into DigitalOcean’s tutorial on Hugo from 2015 year. By the way,

item.title: Theme Demo
item.description: Style Demo h1 Heading h2 Heading h3 Heading h4 Heading h5 Heading h6 Heading This is bold text This is bold text This is italic text This is italic text Deleted text This is text with inline math $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{-n} = 1$ and with math blocks: $$ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{-n} = 1 $$ Heading Another heading text text text text text text Block quotes are written like so.

item.title: Hello!
item.description: My name is Ivan, and I was born in 1988 in Angarsk. From time to time I am interested in: tech, design & programming the art of literature, cinema, poetry & music running for the long distances hiking, riding boards & bikes That’s it for the moment. Good luck and keep in touch!

item.title: Projects
item.description: Nothing to see here… yet. Move along! P.S. Maybe you are looking for my CV, so it’s here.
